info.title: XAI Evaluation API
info.description:
API for accessing XAI benchmark experiment results.
    
    This API provides access to:
    - Experiment runs with XAI methods (LIME, SHAP, etc.)
    - Model performance metrics
    - Explainability scores and evaluations
    - Filtering and searching capabilities
    
    Built for the XAI Evaluation Framework PhD research project.

post.description:
Get access token (Login).

For Phase 1, we use environment variables ADMIN_USERNAME and ADMIN_PASSWORD
to validate the admin user.

get.description: Get all experiment runs with optional filtering and pagination

schema.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

faithfulness.title: Faithfulness
